description_long: This is an upright piano with a rich, dark wood finish and a classic rectangular form. The front features a full keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and three metallic pedals are visible at the base. The wood grain is visible across all surfaces, giving it a polished and elegant appearance. The back is a solid wood panel, while the sides are straight and unadorned, emphasizing the piano's sturdy construction. The keyboard cover is open, exposing the keys, and there is no visible music stand or brand marking. The overall design is traditional, suitable for placement in public spaces, schools, or urban gathering areas.
description: A traditional upright piano with a dark wood finish, full keyboard, and three metallic pedals. The design is classic and polished, with visible wood grain and no music stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, three metallic pedals, and the open keyboard cover.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the piano's depth and the straight, unadorned wood panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid wood back panel with visible grain and no additional features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the piano's depth and clean lines.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard layout with 52 white keys and 36 black keys arranged in alternating groups, no missing or non-standard keys.
attribute_lid_position: keyboard cover open, top lid closed
